Event: Cashback 2024
Event Date: 01/12/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: E29
Engraving 'Explosive Thing'

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the unit explodes a random enemy. The explosion deals 24700 / 35300 / 50400 / 72000 / 96000 / 120000 / 150000 / magic damage and sets the target on fire. The burning enemy takes 20600 / 29400 / 42000 / 60000 / 80000 / 100000 / 125000 magic damage and has their healing rate reduced by 35% for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 2
13000 Spell power from the gems
Once in a while, the unit explodes 2 random enemies. The explosion deals 32900 / 47000 / 67200 / 96000 / 128000 / 160000 / 200000 / magic damage to the targets and all enemies in a small radius around them. Also, the main targets of the explosion catch fire, and enemies in a small radius around them have a 100% chance to catch fire. The burning units take 28800 / 41200 / 58800 / 84000 / 112000 / 140000 / 175000 magic damage and have their healing rate reduced by 35% for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 3
27000 Spell power from the gems
Once in a while, the unit explodes 3 random enemies. The explosion deals 37000 / 52900 / 75600 / 108000 / 144000 / 180000 / 225000 magic damage to the targets and all enemies in a small radius around them. Also, the main targets of the explosion start incinerating, and enemies in a small radius around them have a 100% chance to catch fire. The burning units take 32900 / 47000 / 67200 / 96000 / 128000 / 160000 / 200000 magic damage and have their healing rate reduced by 35% for 3 sec. The incinerated enemies take 13200 / 18800 / 26900 / 38400 / 51200 / 64000 / 80000 pure damage every second for 3 sec, and all enemies in a small radius around the incinerated units take pure damage equal to 65% of the damage taken by the original target. When the incineration wears off, the ability's targets are weakened. Their max health, fortitude, as well as physical and magic armor are reduced by 25% for 3 sec.
